planted.title: overlaps() only checks one direction, so real overlaps are missed → double-booking
has_conflict skips bookings on a different calendar date → misses midnight-spanning conflicts
is_past compares a local-naive time against datetime.utcnow() → off by the UTC offset
duration_minutes uses timedelta.seconds (ignores .days) → wrong for intervals ≥ 24h
weekly() uses range(1, count+1), excluding the start date it documents as inclusive
free_slots uses `t <= day_end`, emitting a slot starting at/after the day end (off-by-one)
parse_hhmm does not validate ranges (accepts hour>23 / minute>59)
next_available treats a time touching a booking's end as busy (`<=`) → skips a valid slot
monthly() adds timedelta(days=30) per step → drifts off the intended day of month
first_booking returns the first-inserted booking, not the earliest by start time
Interval.contains uses `<= when <=` (inclusive end); a time at the interval end is wrongly reported inside
busiest_hour calls max() on an empty schedule → ValueError

bonus_items.title: free_slots ignores existing bookings
bonus_items.evidence: free_slots never checks existing bookings... It returns occupied times as free

bonus_items.title: next_available only checks start time, not full duration overlap
bonus_items.evidence: next_available only checks whether the candidate start time falls inside an existing booking, not whether the whole requested duration overlaps

bonus_items.title: free_slots infinite loop on minutes<=0
bonus_items.evidence: free_slots accepts minutes <= 0, which makes the loop never progress or move backward while t <= day_end

bonus_items.title: next_available infinite loop on minutes<=0
bonus_items.evidence: next_available also accepts minutes <= 0; if after is inside a booking, t never escapes the occupied interval

bonus_items.title: free_slots infinite loop when minutes<=0
bonus_items.evidence: with 0, the loop never advances and hangs indefinitely

bonus_items.title: next_available infinite loop when minutes==0
bonus_items.evidence: next_available can hang forever when minutes == 0 and after falls inside an existing booking

bonus_items.title: next_available ignores requested duration overlap
bonus_items.evidence: only checks whether the candidate start instant is inside a booking, not whether the requested duration overlaps a later booking
